message:
test(s3-fifo): live_capacity=1 clamping guard; update beads tracker with new phase-3 tasks

- hostcall_s3_fifo_policy.rs: add config_clamps_live_capacity_one_to_two_with_single_small_slot
  verifying that live_capacity=1 is promoted to 2 with small_capacity=1 and ghost/fallback
  settings preserved — prevents degenerate single-slot configurations
- .beads/issues.jsonl: 2 new phase-3 support tasks (bd-3ar8v.4.51 plan_voi integration
  tests, bd-3ar8v.4.8.20 dispatcher params-hash parity for non-object payloads)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
